CustomMetadata.label: SRA-005 - Sharing rules grant access to

values.value: Sharing rules grant access to All Internal Users
One or more sharing rules target the All Internal Users public group. This grants every employee in the org access to every record covered by these rules, equivalent to Public Read/Write via sharing.
Sharing rules targeting All Internal Users defeat the purpose of a Private OWD. Any employee, including newly onboarded users and compromised accounts, has access to all affected records.
Replace All Internal Users sharing rules with role-based, profile-based, or public group-based rules that target specific user populations.
